name: Chicken Filled Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 3 (4 oz) Boned, Skinned Chicken Halves, Diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine diced chicken, curry powder, paprika, salt, pepper, and minced garlic. Toss well and cover. Chill mixture for 1 hour.
2. Dissolve bouillon in hot water. Set aside.
3. Coat a large skillet with vegetable spray and add oil. Heat until hot. Add the chicken mixture and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Add green onions and cook for 2 minutes. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
5. Gradually add bouillon mixture and cook for an additional 3 minutes or until thickened, stirring constantly.
6. Stuff each shell with about 1/2 cup of chicken mixture. Arrange in a baking dish coated with spray.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Combine yogurt, tomatoes, water, cumin, and hot sauce in a bowl. Spoon over manicotti. Serve warm.
